subcodes.first_line: The mortals of the divine ocean must, at all times, summon the servants unto the shores of the All-Merciful, for every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فانیان بحر الهی را لازم که در کل احیان عباد را بشطر رحمن بخوانند چه که هر
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
